payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE (subagent + integrated). src/auth_hosted/invites.js membersRouter mounted in the cloud server before the replica gate (so /api/invites/accept works for not-yet-members). Members list/role-change/remove with LAST_OWNER guard + self-leave; invites: owner-only create (sha-256 code hash stored, plaintext shown once, 7-day expiry), list pending, revoke, single-use atomic accept that never downgrades an existing role. Verified end-to-end through the real server: invite -> accept -> viewer can read, cannot write.
